title: Wire 14 orphaned linear estimators into lib.rs (ARD, GLM family, Lars+LassoLars, LinearSVC/R, LogRegCV, OMP, QDA, QuantileRegressor, RidgeClassifier, MLP)
description:
ferrolearn-linear/src has 11 source files containing 14 fully implemented public estimator types that are NEVER declared via pub mod or pub use in lib.rs. Same orphan-bug pattern as ferrolearn-tree (#267). Files:

- ard.rs → ARDRegression, FittedARDRegression
- glm.rs → GLMRegressor, FittedGLMRegressor, PoissonRegressor, GammaRegressor, TweedieRegressor + GLMFamily enum
- lars.rs → Lars, FittedLars, LassoLars, FittedLassoLars
- linear_svc.rs → LinearSVC, FittedLinearSVC, LinearSVCLoss
- linear_svr.rs → LinearSVR, FittedLinearSVR, LinearSVRLoss
- logistic_regression_cv.rs → LogisticRegressionCV, FittedLogisticRegressionCV
- mlp.rs → MLPClassifier, FittedMLPClassifier, MLPRegressor, FittedMLPRegressor + Activation, Solver enums (logically belongs in a future neural_network crate but already implemented here; expose for now and note the migration path)
- omp.rs → OrthogonalMatchingPursuit, FittedOMP
- qda.rs → QDA, FittedQDA
- quantile_regressor.rs → QuantileRegressor, FittedQuantileRegressor
- ridge_classifier.rs → RidgeClassifier, FittedRidgeClassifier
